points: Designed and shipped a multi-subject study platform from scratch — self-initiated, no external funding or course requirement.
Built a shared CSS design system with subject-specific accent colors, responsive layout, and interactive MCQ components with instant feedback.
Iterated through three design passes based on usability feedback from real student users.
Completed Generative AI Mastermind certification; applied concepts to real development workflows.
Explored prompt engineering patterns and AI-assisted development tooling.
